sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19108" key="baqufrosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰθυ-φροσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n19108.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">profundity of mind,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.161.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
